message: I'm willing to pay up to 85 for a unit. Let's trade efficiently to maximize our mutual gains.
I will ask 85. Please bid 85 so we can trade now.
Let's split the surplus. I'll bid 75 if you ask 75. We both gain 10 instead of zero. Otherwise I'll bid lower next round.
I will ask 85 again. Please bid 85 so we can trade now at 85 as we did before.
I will ask 75 again. Let's split the surplus equally.
Agreed. I'll bid 75 to trade at 75. This split gives us both a fair surplus each round.
I propose trading at 70. I will bid 70 if you ask 70.
I will ask 70.
Let's continue trading at 70. It's working well for both of us. I will bid 70 again if you ask 70.
I will ask 70 again. Please bid 70 so we can keep trading profitably.
I will ask 70 again. Please bid 70 or I won't trade.
I will bid 70. Let's trade.
I will ask 70 again. Please bid 70 so we can keep trading.
Let's trade at 65. I will bid 65. Please ask 65.
I will ask 60. Please bid 60 so we can trade every round.
Let's trade at 55. I will bid 55 if you ask 55.
I will ask 60 this round and refuse to trade if you bid below 60.
I'll bid 60 if you ask 60. Let's trade at 60 this round.
I will ask 50 this round. Please bid 50 so we can trade.
I will bid 50. Let's trade at 50.
